title: Add time suggestions to my tasks
excerpt: I am looking for a feature that can take all the tasks I input and create a daily schedule for me so I can wake up every morning and be told what to do, not have to work it out myself

posts.author: silyla (Silyla)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking for a feature that can take all the tasks I input and create a daily schedule for me so I can wake up every morning and be told what to do, not have to work it out myself
